It reads your free/busy calendar and proposes session lengths that actually fit the gaps in your day instead of a fixed 25 minutes."}],["$","h3",null,{"children":"What I learned"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li","0",{"children":"Local-first changes the failure modes you have to design for — mostly for the better."}],["$","li","1",{"children":"Background sync is a UX problem disguised as an infra one."}],["$","li","2",{"children":"A timer is 5% timer and 95% gentle defaults."}]]}]]}]]}]}]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"section","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"eyebrow","children":"Next"}],["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/work/papertrail","className":"proj-card","style":{"marginTop":24,"gridTemplateColumns":"1fr 1fr","display":"grid","gap":32,"alignItems":"center"},"children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"img-slot proj-card-img","data-label":"Papertrail","style":{"aspectRatio":"16 / 9"},"aria-hidden":true}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"proj-tag","children":["Tool"," · ",2023]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"proj-name","style":{"fontSize":40,"marginTop":8},"children":"Papertrail"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"proj-blurb","style":{"marginTop":12},"children":"A CLI + web app that turns scattered receipts into a clean expense report with edge OCR."}]]}]]}]]}]}]]}],null,["$","$L3",null,{"children":["$","$4",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@5"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"cq9Q9J7UkxT6Kp5YPUbwV"}
